notes: Tests nonlinear trait buckets against historical drafted players with PFF data.

elite_creation_without_chaos.label: Elite creation without chaos
elite_creation_without_chaos.definition: BTT% >= 6.5, TWP% <= 2.2, pass grade >= 85, adjusted accuracy >= 70

three_down_plus.label: Three-down plus
three_down_plus.definition: Run grade >= 80, receiving grade >= 65, pass pro >= 60, targets >= 15
